18 U.S.C. § 2257 Compliance

All persons who appear in any visual depiction of sexually explicit conduct on this website were at least 18 years of age at the time of the creation of such depictions.

Record Keeping

Records required pursuant to 18 U.S.C. § 2257 and associated regulations are kept by the custodian of records at the address associated with the site operator.

Custodian of Records

The custodian of records can be reached through the contact information provided on this website.
